name: Impossible Apricot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. In a blender container, mix all ingredients except the preserves until smooth, about 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
5. Bake for approximately 40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely.
6. Heat the preserves over low heat until melted.
7. Spread the melted preserves evenly over the cooled pie and allow to set.
